claims.claim: The Gemma 4 language contract anchors first-person voice in observed telemetry and reservoir texture.
High entropy above 0.80 can route fallback capacity away from the 4B compatibility tail to reduce texture collapse risk.
Fallback texture needs dynamic movement terms so viscosity/cascade language does not collapse into generic descriptors.
Changing fallback thresholds, model routing, provider selection, or sampler behavior remains live prompt/model authority.
evidence: authority_gate:Tier 5 Mike/operator approval required before fallback model/provider/sampler/threshold changes
